loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing monthly active and reactive energy totals — per-phase energy and subsidy targets are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive power demand profiles; rated and contracted power lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power as the input proxy and derived energy loss for the loss metric; no dedicated separate input/output sensing rails exist for this single-terminal meter.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load and load factor — expected load, anomaly events, and threshold data are not measured by this asset.
